calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elaine Ercolini for Anthony Dougherty (Trustee).

Ms. Ercolini stated that her Client and Kathleen were married for 51 years prior to her death, that they have two Children, that her Client is the sole trustee and that the Children have consented. Ms. Ercolini also stated that Mr. Dougherty and James Krupka (drafting Attorney) both indicated that there was no decision by Kathleen for A/B split for the purpose of control and that the only purpose was for tax purposes. Discussion was held with respect to the survivor's trust being a revocable trust and the Petitioner's power of appointment. The Petition to Modify Trust is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
